report: Programmatic SEO Upgrade Modules + Execution Rules + New Page Rules + Index Bloat Control

A_short_answer.description: Direct answer block (50-80 words) targeting main query
A_short_answer.example: For a mortgage affordability guide: 'The 28/36 rule means your housing should cost ≤28% of gross income. At $100K income, you can afford ~$350K home with 20% down at 6.5%. Use our calculator for your exact numbers.'

B_real_example.description: Realistic example with specific numbers showing input → result
B_real_example.example: Meet Sarah, earning $85K with $500/month in student loans. With 20% down at 6.5%, she qualifies for a $275K home. Monthly payment: $1,983.

C_comparison_table.description: Useful for vs/best/compare queries. No fake rankings.

D_faq_expansion.description: 3-6 FAQs based on Google Suggest/PAA/GSC queries
D_faq_expansion.faq_schema: FAQPage schema only when FAQs are visibly rendered on page

E_calculator_cta.description: Clear call to use related calculator. No answer cannibalization.
E_calculator_cta.template: Try our free {calculator_name} Calculator → Enter your numbers for personalized results.

I_schema_fix.description: Ensure correct schema type per page

execution_priority_order: P0: Technical fixes (canonical, schema, robots, sitemap)
P1: Pages with impressions and 0 clicks (CTR fix)
P2: Indexed but ranking 11-50 (internal links + content)
P3: Discovered/crawled not indexed with demand (upgrade to indexable)
P4: Tier 2/3 calculators with business value
P7: Noindex/consolidation review (Auditor + Technical Guardian required)

conditions: Query has evidence from GSC, Google Suggest, or Trends
No existing page can satisfy intent

index_bloat_control.note: 225 tools flagged for consolidation review — most are Tier 2/3 programmatic tools with no demand. Do NOT delete. Review individually.
